lead_level_notes.notes: Keep the Zenodo/GitLab repository as the preferred root candidate; article and preprint hits are context.

next_action: Keep as a source-family candidate keyed to the Zenodo/GitLab repository; inspect the zip/file inventory for reusable study-pair or effect-size tables, then map any RPP/RPEE-derived child tables to their originating project parents where appropriate.
preferred_source_family_name: Heyard and Held heterogeneity_in_replication_projects code/data repository
reason: The cluster is not just an isolated article hit: checked sources show an article/preprint plus a Zenodo/GitLab code-and-data repository for analyses of original-replication study-pairs in large-scale replication projects. The repository is a reusable source object, but its internal files still need inventory before any table-level integration.
